YUWANCARD-PIG_HURT.title: Pig Hurt
YUWANCARD-PIG_HURT.description: Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} stacks of [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to all enemies.
YUWANCARD-PIG_THINK.title: Pig Think
YUWANCARD-PIG_ANGRY.title: Pig Angry
YUWANCARD-PIG_SLEEP.title: Pig Sleep
YUWANCARD-PIG_SLEEP.description:
End your turn
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]
Heal {Heal:diff()} HP
YUWANCARD-PIG_SACRIFICE.title: Pig Sacrifice
YUWANCARD-PIG_SACRIFICE.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Give all HP and Block to target ally.|Give 50% HP and Block to target ally.}
YUWANCARD-PIG_DOUBT.title: Pig Doubt
YUWANCARD-NYJK.title: You Are Crying
YUWANCARD-NYJK.description: Apply {WeakPower:diff()} stacks of [gold]Weak[/gold] to an enemy and remove 50% of its [gold]Block[/gold].
YUWANCARD-GIVE_YOU.title: I Give You
YUWANCARD-GIVE_YOU.description: Choose a card from your hand to give to target ally.
YUWANCARD-GIVE_YOU.selectionScreenPrompt: Select 1 card to give to ally
YUWANCARD-WYJK.title: I Am Crying
YUWANCARD-MELANCHOLY_RABBIT.title: Melancholy Is A Feeling
YUWANCARD-MELANCHOLY_RABBIT.description: Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to your current HP.
YUWANCARD-SAD_ARMY_WIN.title: Sad Army Wins
YUWANCARD-SAD_ARMY_WIN.description: When your HP is below 10%, kill {IfUpgraded:show:all|one} enemies.
YUWANCARD-REVIVE_KAI.title: Revive!
YUWANCARD-REVIVE_KAI.description: Revive a fallen ally and restore {IfUpgraded:show:100%|50%} of their max HP.
YUWANCARD-RAIN_DARK.title: Rain Dark
YUWANCARD-RAIN_DARK.description: All players' HP becomes 25% of max HP, gain {IntangiblePower:diff()} stacks of [gold]Intangible[/gold], double current Energy, gain double Energy for the next {RainDarkPower:diff()} turns, draw to max hand size. Heal 6 HP after combat.
YUWANCARD-RAIN_DARK_SELECT.title: Rain Dark
YUWANCARD-RAIN_DARK_SELECT.description: Add a [gold]Rain Dark[/gold] to your hand.
YUWANCARD-TEN_THOUSAND_SWORDS.title: Ten Thousand Swords
YUWANCARD-TEN_THOUSAND_SWORDS.descriptio: Stack all other players' [gold]Forge Points[/gold] onto yourself, then clear other players' [gold]Forge Points[/gold].
YUWANCARD-PIG_TOUCH_FISH.title: Pig Slacking
YUWANCARD-PIG_TOUCH_FISH.description: Retain your hand this turn. Gain {EnergyNextTurnPower:diff()} Energy next turn.
YUWANCARD-PIG_BANKRUPTCY.title: Pig Bankruptcy
YUWANCARD-PIG_BANKRUPTCY.description: All cards in hand cost 0 this turn, but they all have [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
YUWANCARD-PIG_CHARGE.title: Pig Charge
YUWANCARD-PIG_MULTI_SHOT.title: Pig Barrage
YUWANCARD-PIG_MULTI_SHOT.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Repeat:diff()} times to an enemy.
YUWANCARD-PIG_SHIELD_BREAK.title: Pig Shield Break
YUWANCARD-PIG_SHIELD_BREAK.description: Remove 50% of an enemy's [gold]Block[/gold] and deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
YUWANCARD-PIG_KING.title: Pig King
YUWANCARD-PIG_KING.description: Choose 3 cards from your hand, transform them into {IfUpgraded:show:upgraded |}[gold]Pig Charge[/gold], [gold]Pig Barrage[/gold], and [gold]Pig Shield Break[/gold].
YUWANCARD-PIG_BRAIN_OVERLOAD.title: Pig Brain Overload
YUWANCARD-PIG_BRAIN_OVERLOAD.description: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} this turn. Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Every {IfUpgraded:show:3|2} turns, gain 1 [gold]Dazed[/gold].
YUWANCARD-PIG_MELT.title: Pig Melt
YUWANCARD-PIG_MELT.description: Gain {BufferPower:diff()} stack(s) of [gold]Buffer[/gold]. End your turn.
YUWANCARD-PIG_DRAGON_RIDE.title: Pig Dragon Ride
YUWANCARD-PIG_DRAGON_RIDE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage 3 times to an enemy.
YUWANCARD-PIG_CRASH.title: Pig Crash
YUWANCARD-PIG_CRASH.description: Lose 2 HP. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
YUWANCARD-YOU_ARE_PIG.title: You Are Pig
YUWANCARD-YOU_ARE_PIG.description: Make a teammate turn into a pig, gaining {BufferPower:diff()} stacks of [gold]Buffer[/gold] and {RegenPower:diff()} stacks of [gold]Regen[/gold], then end their turn.
YUWANCARD-PIG_BITE.title: Pig Bite
YUWANCARD-PIG_BITE.description: Apply {PoisonPower:diff()} stacks of [gold]Poison[/gold], {WeakPower:diff()} stack of [gold]Weak[/gold], {VulnerablePower:diff()} stack of [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to an enemy. Turn their model into a pig for 1 turn.
